sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8737" key="*)anqesfo/ria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Ἀνθεσ-φόρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, a festival in honour of Persephone, who was carried off while <sense id="n8737.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gathering flowers,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.37</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
